data.body: a8e5 IMPLEMENTED + COMMITTED (76dcafcab) under held-out TDD. 3 deterministic components: (1) absence-claim veto — claims_absence + absence_confirmed_in_context binaries in shared verify contract (byte-identical across all 3 gate models) + symmetric veto in decide.pass3_decide (reason veto:absence-refuted); (2) DET hygiene backstop — det_finding_has_subject drops subject-less DET findings at det_blocking/advisory_findings; (3) operator-attested AC awareness — operator_attested_ac_texts + enrich_operator_attested clears ac_unverifiable upstream of impact_plan (kernel math byte-unchanged), wired fail-open into plan_review_decide. 166 affected tests pass; 19 held-out edge tests pass; 3 mutations confirmed teeth; lint+typecheck clean. GOTCHA HIT+RECOVERED: mutation-check used 'git checkout <file>' which reverted the subagent's UNCOMMITTED impl in decide.py/det_floor.py/workflow_ops.py — re-applied all three by hand (they were fully specified), re-validated green. Commit carries Change-Id + DCO + rebar-ticket trailer, bot identity. NEXT: d4cf (G7 leaf-parent-containment).
